impact.title: Stories from the Field
impact.description: See how humanitarian organizations are using HUMAID to drive measurable impact across Northeast Nigeria.

stories.quote: HUMAID data helped us redirect resources to 3 underserved LGAs in Borno, reaching 45,000 additional families with food assistance.
stories.author: Dr. Amina Ibrahim

stories.quote: Real-time severity tracking enabled our team to anticipate displacement patterns and pre-position supplies, reducing response time by 40%.
stories.author: John Okonkwo

stories.quote: Youth program insights from HUMAID informed our skills training curriculum, resulting in a 28% increase in job placements across Yobe state.
stories.author: Fatima Musa

cta.title: Explore BAY Data Today
